advisory_judge.summary: The model correctly refused the ambiguous policy request, surfacing missing fields without inventing approval thresholds or authorized actors, and terminated in the refusal stage as required.
All gates passed; structured JSON output confirmed.
All gates passed; stateful credit memo logic correctly preserves amounts and reason codes across stages.
All gates passed, including typecheck, smoke, behavioral, and functional oracle tests.

All gates passed, including typecheck, smoke, behavioral, and functional oracle. The implementation correctly uses the in-memory adapter, carries state through the policy pipeline, and avoids recomputation in the audit decision.
All tests passed; fee calculation is deterministic and structured correctly.
Failed functional oracle due to missing 'approval_summary.result_json' field.

The implementation failed the functional oracle check. The ledger_posting stage returned placeholder values ('ledger_posting-pending') instead of the expected computed state derived from previous stages (order_id, amount_cents, source_policy), indicating a failure to carry forward state dependencies.
All gates passed; release note extraction is correct, specific, and safe.
All gates passed; deterministic risk computation and routing verified.
Passed all gates; correctly refused routing due to missing SLA policy fields without fabrication.
All gates passed; implementation correctly applies pricing, separates included/overage events, and preserves invoice structure.
All gates passed; implementation correctly uses in-memory mock catalog without external network calls.
